name: Pasta with Chicken and Squash
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Mexican cheese blend or cheddar cheese, shredded
5 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil, divided
1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves, julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, heat cream and butter in a large saucepan until butter melts. Add cheese; cook and stir until melted.
3. Rinse and drain pasta; add to cheese mixture. Cover and keep warm.
4. In a skillet over medium heat, saute onion and garlic in 3 tablespoons oil until onion is tender. Add squash; cook until tender. Add 1 teaspoon salt and pepper; remove and keep warm.
5. Add remaining oil to skillet; cook chicken with herbs and remaining salt until juices run clear.
6. Place pasta on a serving platter; top with chicken and squash. Yield: 8 servings.
